instruction:
Let $x$ be an integer with $10\leq x\leq99$ . $M$ is a positive integer such that for every pair of even positive integers $(i,j)$ , the difference $x^i-x^j$ is a multiple of $M$ . Find the remainder when the maximum possible value of $M$ is divided by $1000$ .

Options:
A. 798
B. 788
C. 784
D. 800
E. 795
F. 799
G. 792
H. 794
I. 796
J. 790
